replacementRequirements.requiredChange: No replacement required from the latest run.
No replacement required from the latest run.
No replacement required from the latest run.

pressureYield.recommendedAction: continue generator-born InsightCandidate closure with full downstream gates

closureYield.recommendedAction: create a new stable DiscoveryCandidate claim lift with external scientific significance before rerunning long searches; current closure candidates classify as pipeline_fund_candidate because the frozen InsightCandidate scope still carries anti-discovery or pipeline-scope caveats

gates.message: Generator registry must include the three required mechanism-first families for the selected generator set.
Every generator family must start from a public external problem anchor with explicit domain scientific significance and at least two public significance refs.
Generator audit requires a focused generator run artifact.
Focused generator validation must run at least thirty runtime checks when all families run.
Every generator output must explicitly decide hardSeedBirth born or blocked.
ExternalValueGate must run before HardSeed birth and block internal-only outputs when present.
Focused validation must either produce a birth-eligible hard seed or prove precise blocker causes for every output.
If runtime generator validation creates no HardSeeds, the audit must expose concrete generator replacement requirements instead of a green-only audit.
Generator audit must not stay green after generator-pressure kills every born hard seed before InsightCandidate birth.
Generator audit must not stay green after package/Fund closure classifies every closure candidate as non-discovery unless a later claim-lift intake produced a discovery-scored Fund.
Generator runs must not create FUND_FOUND.md or fund-candidate.json; a later discovery-scored claim-lift intake may own root Fund state.
